raw_consumer_statement:
I was in XXXX XXXX XX/XX/XXXX to XX/XX/XXXX. I rented a car from XXXX and use there issuance to cover my liability while in XXXX XXXX. I confirmed from XXXX if I needed pay any other insurance while in the country and they confirm I do not. ( have in writing ). When in XXXX they charged me {$200.00} saying its not good enough and its the country law. Truth there is not such thing as XXXX law given I already have my coverage and its a scam. 

I disputed with American express and they still favor the rental car with proof provided by the rental car department when signed under duress.
